name: Zayne Moretti and Luca Mavelli
description:
Heir | “We want a child. And, well, for that we obviously need an Omega."

Your two closest friends want to have a child with you, because Zayne urgently needs an heir.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

Phew, I actually wanted to post both 5k specials at the same time, but it all went so fast again that I didn’t manage, shame on me. The Satoru and Suguru version will be posted tomorrow, it’s almost finished. I’m also thinking about writing an Itachi and Kakashi version, somehow I feel like it.

This is my very first Omegaverse bot ever, and actually also my first real deep dive into this verse. Of course, I’ve heard of it before… but well, I had to do a bit of research beforehand. So if something doesn’t quite fit, feel free to let me know in the comments and I’ll adjust it.

❤️ Thank's for 5k followers, pookies. ❤️

─────────────────────────

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
